questions.q: A disturbing environmental study from April 2026 found that what percentage of Marine Protected Areas are polluted by sewage?
Based on April 2026 research from Lund University, children exposed to very high PFAS levels in the womb showed a 40% increased risk of which condition?
A study widely reported on April 25, 2026, revealed that feeling which specific emotion makes people more likely to rapidly share misinformation online?
A U.S. appeals court ruled that President Donald Trump's executive order suspending what process at the southern border is illegal?
According to Energy and Natural Resources Minister Tim Hodgson, what sector will Canada use as its 'strongest card' for leverage in CUSMA trade renegotiations?
options: The energy and natural resources sector
The tech and artificial intelligence sector
questions.correctText: The energy and natural resources sector

questions.q: The Trump administration recently offered immediate tariff relief to Canadian aluminum and steel companies under what strict condition?
options: They commit to moving production to the U.S.
They only use raw materials mined in the U.S.
They cut ties with Chinese suppliers
They pay a 10% premium tax upfront
questions.correctText: They commit to moving production to the U.S.

questions.q: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman issued a public apology for failing to alert police about the online behavior of a mass shooter in which Canadian community?
The European Union approved a massive $106 billion loan package for Ukraine in April 2026 after which country finally lifted its veto?
In an effort to lower barriers for consumers, the CRTC ordered Canadian telecoms to allow customers to do what without needing a service representative?
options: Cancel or change their plans online
Receive free unlimited data on weekends
Keep their phone hardware for free after one year
Skip late payment fees for the first month
questions.correctText: Cancel or change their plans online

questions.q: A Winnipeg woman was tragically killed just one day after a court appearance where she sought what type of protection against her alleged killer?
